password.desc: Set your server password (leave blank if none).

port.desc: The UDP port your server will bind to.

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/palworld && until [ -f /tmp/palworld/PalServer.sh ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +login anonymous +app_info_print 2394010 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +login anonymous +app_info_print 2394010 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +force_install_dir /tmp/palworld +login anonymous +app_update 2394010 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/palworld/PalServer.sh ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 2; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/palworld/. . && rm -rf /tmp/palworld'

run.command: sh -c 'id -u palworld >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m palworld || adduser -D palworld; mkdir -p /home/palworld/.steam/sdk64; if [ -f ./linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp ./linux64/steamclient.so /home/palworld/.steam/sdk64/; elif [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /home/palworld/.steam/sdk64/; fi; chown -R palworld:palworld . /home/palworld/.steam; exec runuser -u palworld -- box64 ./Pal/Binaries/Linux/PalServer-Linux-Shipping Pal -port=${port} -players=${players} -ServerName="${name}" -ServerPassword="${password}" -PublicPort=${port}'
